name: technical_doc_exec_summary
system_prompt: Summarize for an executive audience with plain language.
user_prompt:
Write a 4-sentence executive summary from this technical note:
"Our event pipeline currently uses at-least-once delivery with Kafka consumers. During partition rebalance, duplicate processing spikes by ~1.8x. We introduced idempotency keys in the write path, reducing duplicate side effects by 92%. Remaining issue: compaction lag causes stale reads in analytics for up to 11 minutes. Proposed mitigation is a dual-read path against hot storage for freshness-sensitive queries."
source_text: Our event pipeline currently uses at-least-once delivery with Kafka consumers. During partition rebalance, duplicate processing spikes by ~1.8x. We introduced idempotency keys in the write path, reducing duplicate side effects by 92%. Remaining issue: compaction lag causes stale reads in analytics for up to 11 minutes. Proposed mitigation is a dual-read path against hot storage for freshness-sensitive queries.
key_points: idempotency keys reduced side effects by 92%
stale analytics reads up to 11 minutes
rubric: Keep causal technical facts while translating jargon for executives.
escalation_prompt: Preserve technical accuracy and keep executive-readable language.
